findings.evidence: Grep hits: `UniversalCoverPrelude.lean:18-23` says these are pending Mathlib declarations; public/root names appear at lines 44, 58, 81, 148, 207, 268, 295, 306, and 321.
findings.fix: Keep the shim in a TauCeti-specific namespace/name and provide local aliases only internally, or remove/replace these declarations in the same PR that bumps Mathlib before importing the upstream names publicly.
findings.issue: The vendored prelude exposes pending Mathlib declarations with their upstream names (`exists_monotone_partition_Icc`, `Path.subpathOn`, `Path.Homotopic.of_trans_symm`, etc.), so a Mathlib bump that includes the cited upstream PRs will fail before downstream code can migrate.

summary: The PR does not silently remove or rename existing TauCeti API, but it publicly vendors upstream-style declarations under root/Mathlib namespaces, making the next Mathlib bump that lands those names a duplicate-declaration break.
